documentation.description:
Notes:

Functions which have names in lower as well as upper case
This is the case for Spherical Bessel Functions
    eg J0_e has a variation j0_e
The uppercase functions are named with 2 letters eg JJ0_e

subprograms.name: bessel_In
subprograms.code:
function bessel_In
  (n : int;
   x : double)
   return double
